center.name: 苏厄德半岛
center.summary: 苏厄德半岛是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括黑喉潛鳥，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The black-throated loon has a large range, breeding taking place across northern Europe, Asia, and the Seward Peninsula in Alaska. When breeding, it is found in the area around isolated, deep freshwater lakes larger than ,{{cite journal|last1=Hake|first1=Mikael|last2=Dahlgren|first2=Tomas|last3=Åhlund|first3=Matti|last4=Lindberg|first4=Peter|last5=Eriksson|first5=Mats O
